shellCommands.command: cd /home/user/workspace/vectorops && python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]); print('dotproduct works correctly')"

/home/user/workspace/vectorenv/bin/pypi-server -p 8080 --passwords="" --disable-fallback /home/user/workspace/vectorops/dist 2>&1 &
echo "PID: $!"
disown
sleep 2
# Verify it's running
curl -s http://localhost:8080/simple/ | head -20
sleep 3 && curl -s http://localhost:8080/simple/ && echo "" && echo "---" && ps aux | grep pypi | grep -v grep

# Kill the previous one and restart properly detached
kill $(pgrep -f "pypi-server") 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
nohup /home/user/workspace/vectorenv/bin/pypi-server run -p 8080 -a . -P . --disable-fallback /home/user/workspace/vectorops/dist > /home/user/workspace/pypi_server.log 2>&1 &
sleep 3
curl -s http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/
pgrep -f "pypi-server" && echo "server process exists" || echo "no server process"

kill -9 1824 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
# Check if port 8080 is free
ss -tlnp | grep 8080 || echo "Port 8080 is free"
sleep 3 && curl -s http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/ && echo "" && ps aux | grep pypi | grep -v grep
/tmp/test-vectorops/bin/python -c "from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]); print('All tests passed!')"
